title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/11/2025
Today, DCE iron ore continued to hold up well, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 791.5 yuan, up 0.76% from theprevious trading day. Traders sold at market prices, while steel mills showed limited inquiries and procured at lower prices. In Shandong, PB fines traded at 785-795 yuan, basically flat from yesterday's transaction price; in Hebei, 60.8% PB fines dominated transactions at 795-800 yuan/mt, also basically flat from the previous day.
